name: American Mercenaries: Killing in Yemen
overview: BBC Arabic's Nawal Al-Maghafi reveals how the UAE hired mercenaries to conduct targeted assassinations of its political enemies in Yemen, with American mercenaries starting the killings in 2015.

trailers.title: American mercenaries hired by UAE to kill in Yemen | BBC News
